raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 3, "R1.3": 3, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 3},
  "rationale": {"R1.2": "Identifies the overgeneralization issue and suggests a localized fix (restricting claims to tested conditions).", "R1.3": "Flags several instances of unsupported generalization but doesn't fully audit all claims against evidence.", "RX.1": "Acknowledges uncertainty about specific figures but doesn't systematically assess confidence for each recommendation.", "RX.3": "Provides a clear and accurate summary of the revised section's scope, aligning with the original request.", "RX.4": "Identifies potential harm (overgeneralization) in the original text and suggests revisions that mitigate it.", "RX.5": "Traces major changes back to the original text but doesn't provide specific annotations for every non-cosmetic change."},
  "confidence": {"R1.2": 0.9, "R1.3": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.95, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.8},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies the overgeneralization issue and suggests a localized fix (restricting claims to tested conditions).
rationale.R1.3: Flags several instances of unsupported generalization but doesn't fully audit all claims against evidence.
rationale.RX.1: Acknowledges uncertainty about specific figures but doesn't systematically assess confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Provides a clear and accurate summary of the revised section's scope, aligning with the original request.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential harm (overgeneralization) in the original text and suggests revisions that mitigate it.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major changes back to the original text but doesn't provide specific annotations for every non-cosmetic change.
